result.markdown:
---
title: "Strontium (Sr) Agriculture site RF_Regression"
author: "Alex Koiter"
---



## Load libraries


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(randomForest)
  library(terra)
  library(caret)
  library(patchwork)
  library(sf)
})
```
:::



## Load data


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
 attribute <- c("plan_curvature", "profile_curvature", "saga_wetness_index", "catchment_area", "relative_slope_position", "channel_network_distance", "elevation")

data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/ag_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  select("x", "y", "sr", any_of(attribute))
```
:::



## Map soil property


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
temp_rast <- rast(data)
crs(x = temp_rast, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"

coords <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/coords.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("long", "lat"),  crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 26914)

p1<- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = sr)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Sr", breaks = seq(4, 9, 1)) +
  geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Agriculture")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")

p2 <- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = temp_rast, aes(fill = elevation)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Elevation (m)", option = "inferno") +
  geom_sf(data = filter(coords, site == "Agriculture")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br")
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-asp: 0.5
p1+p2  
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Sr_Ag_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=1152}
:::
:::




## RF model original 49 data points


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
x <- "sr"
data <- orig_data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/ag_data_49.csv")) |>
  select(x, any_of(attribute))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 49 Columns: 22
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
dbl (22): plan_curvature, profile_curvature, saga_wetness_index, catchment_a...

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Warning: Using an external vector in selections was deprecated in tidyselect 1.1.0.
ℹ Please use `all_of()` or `any_of()` instead.
  # Was:
  data %>% select(x)

  # Now:
  data %>% select(all_of(x))

See <https://tidyselect.r-lib.org/reference/faq-external-vector.html>.
```


:::
:::



### Training and test data sets


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
set.seed(222)
ind <- sample(2, nrow(data), replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.7, 0.3))
train <- data[ind==1,]
test <- data[ind==2,]
```
:::



### Feature selection


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
features <- usdm::vifstep(data.frame(select(train, all_of(attribute))), th = 10)

train <- train %>% 
  usdm::exclude(features)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
test <- test %>% 
  usdm::exclude(features)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Warning in usdm::exclude(., features): No variable to exclude!
```


:::
:::



### Tune RF


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
my_mtry <- tuneRF(y = train[[x]], x = train[attribute], trace = TRUE, plot = TRUE) |>
  data.frame() |>
  slice(which.min(OOBError)) |>
  pull(mtry)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
mtry = 2  OOB error = 575.6209 
Searching left ...
mtry = 1 	OOB error = 844.2639 
-0.4667013 0.05 
Searching right ...
mtry = 4 	OOB error = 500.0897 
0.1312169 0.05 
mtry = 7 	OOB error = 469.1724 
0.06182336 0.05 
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Sr_Ag_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



### Fit Model


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
rf.fit <- randomForest(sr ~ ., data = train, 
                       ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE, importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry)
rf.fit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
 randomForest(formula = sr ~ ., data = train, ntree = 500, keep.forest = TRUE,      importance = TRUE, mtry = my_mtry) 
               Type of random forest: regression
                     Number of trees: 500
No. of variables tried at each split: 7

          Mean of squared residuals: 441.3259
                    % Var explained: 64.37
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
plot(rf.fit)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Sr_Ag_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::




### Test Model
Uses the RF model to predict the test dataset. We compare predicted against actual


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
prediction <- predict(rf.fit, newdata = test)
test_plot <- data.frame(pred = prediction, obs = test[[x]])

r_sq <- summary(lm(pred~obs, data = test_plot))
r_sq
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
lm(formula = pred ~ obs, data = test_plot)

Residuals:
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-18.523  -7.839  -3.487   8.558  26.948 

Coefficients:
            Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept) 24.66390    6.53577   3.774  0.00184 ** 
obs          0.65709    0.07072   9.291  1.3e-07 ***
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Residual standard error: 12.5 on 15 degrees of freedom
Multiple R-squared:  0.852,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.8421 
F-statistic: 86.33 on 1 and 15 DF,  p-value: 1.302e-07
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
ggplot(data = test_plot, aes(y = pred, x = obs)) +
  geom_point() +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_line() +
  ggpmisc::stat_poly_eq() +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Registered S3 methods overwritten by 'ggpp':
  method                  from   
  heightDetails.titleGrob ggplot2
  widthDetails.titleGrob  ggplot2
```


:::

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Sr_Ag_RF_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-10-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
mse_test <- test_plot %>%
  summarise(mse = mean((obs - pred)^2))

mse_test 
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
       mse
1 365.5104
```


:::
:::



## Importance


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
ImpData <- as.data.frame(importance(rf.fit)) %>%
  mutate(Var.Names = row.names(.)) %>%
 `row.names<-`(as.character(1:nrow(importance(rf.fit))))
```
:::


### Top based on IncNodePurity


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     %IncMSE IncNodePurity                Var.Names
7 31.9326303    27001.0973                elevation
3  7.5254756     4707.1252       saga_wetness_index
4  1.9430584     1952.6434           catchment_area
5  0.2377045     1283.4283  relative_slope_position
2 -1.6570238     1146.5698        profile_curvature
6 -3.9979044     1116.7550 channel_network_distance
1 -1.0580021      739.8332           plan_curvature
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
p1 <- ggplot(slice_max(ImpData,order_by = IncNodePurity, n = 10), aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = IncNodePurity)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, IncNodePurity), y = 0, yend = IncNodePurity), color="skyblue") +
  geom_point(aes(size = `%IncMSE`), color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Terrain Attribute", y = "IncNodePurity") +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")
```
:::



### Top 10 based on %IncMSE


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
slice_max(ImpData,order_by = `%IncMSE`, n = 10)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
     %IncMSE IncNodePurity                Var.Names
7 31.9326303    27001.0973                elevation
3  7.5254756     4707.1252       saga_wetness_index
4  1.9430584     1952.6434           catchment_area
5  0.2377045     1283.4283  relative_slope_position
1 -1.0580021      739.8332           plan_curvature
2 -1.6570238     1146.5698        profile_curvature
6 -3.9979044     1116.7550 channel_network_distance
```


:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
p2<- ggplot(slice_max(ImpData,order_by = `%IncMSE`, n = 10), aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), y = `%IncMSE`)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), xend = fct_reorder(Var.Names, `%IncMSE`), y = 0, yend = `%IncMSE`), color="skyblue") +
  geom_point(aes(size = IncNodePurity), color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Terrain Attribute", y = "%IncMSE") +
  theme(legend.position="bottom")
```
:::


### Combined



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: Original data
#| fig-cap: Ag Sr 
p1+p2
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![Ag Sr](Sr_Ag_RF_files/figure-html/Original data-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



## Write data



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
importance_data <- ImpData %>%
  mutate(MSE_rank = rank(-`%IncMSE`)) %>%
  mutate(Purity_rank = rank(-IncNodePurity)) %>%
  mutate(site = "Agriculture",
        property = "Sr")

if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))) {
  importance_data_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv")) |>
    rows_upsert(importance_data, by = c("MSE_rank", "site", "property")) 
} else importance_data_final <- importance_data
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 154 Columns: 7
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
chr (3): Var.Names, site, property
dbl (4): %IncMSE, IncNodePurity, MSE_rank, Purity_rank

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
write_csv(importance_data_final, here::here("./notebooks/importance_data_49.csv"))


model_performance <- tibble(MSE = rf.fit$mse[length(rf.fit$mse)],
       Var_exp = rf.fit$rsq[length(rf.fit$rsq)],
       R2 = r_sq$r.squared, 
       mse_test = mse_test$mse,
       site = "Agriculture",
       property = "Sr")

if(file.exists(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv"))) {
  model_performance_final <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv")) |>
    rows_upsert(model_performance, by = c("site", "property")) 
} else model_performance_final <- model_performance
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
Rows: 22 Columns: 6
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
chr (2): site, property
dbl (4): MSE, Var_exp, R2, mse_test

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
write_csv(model_performance_final, here::here("./notebooks/model_performance_data_49.csv"))
```
:::
